name: zuar-portal-mcp-server
description: Create and manage Zuar Portal blocks, pages, data sources, queries, users and more with Claude.
long_description: An MCP server that lets Claude operate a Zuar Portal (zPortal) end to end. Typed, validated tools author HTML blocks; a generic resource layer covers layouts (pages), datasources, queries, db_modifications, partials, themes, users, groups, permissions, access policies, API keys, credentials, snippets, translations, dashboards, tags and system records. Action tools handle sample-row previews, query execution, database modifications, password changes, user group/permission assignment and config. A layered write-safety model keeps low-risk content edits on by default while data (SQL) and admin (users/security) writes stay opt-in.

tools.name: list_blocks
tools.description: List blocks on the portal.

tools.name: get_block
tools.description: Get a block by UUID.

tools.name: create_block
tools.description: Create an HTML block (validated).

tools.name: update_block
tools.description: Update an HTML block (validated).

tools.name: delete_block
tools.description: Delete a block by UUID.

tools.name: bind_block_query
tools.description: Bind a block to a datasource/query (auto-creates the query); sets ui_queries.

tools.name: add_block_to_page
tools.description: Place an existing block on a page (layout grid).

tools.name: remove_block_from_page
tools.description: Remove a block from a page without deleting the block.

tools.name: describe_resource
tools.description: Show a resource's fields, verbs, and risk domain.

tools.name: list_resource
tools.description: List records of a resource (datasource, layout, query, user, ...).

tools.name: get_resource
tools.description: Get one record of a resource by id.

tools.name: create_resource
tools.description: Create a record (write-gated by risk domain).

tools.name: update_resource
tools.description: Update a record (merge over current; write-gated).

tools.name: delete_resource
tools.description: Delete a record (write-gated).

tools.name: get_rules
tools.description: Get active block-authoring rules.

tools.name: get_version
tools.description: Get portal version / about info.

tools.name: fetch_sample_rows
tools.description: Preview rows from a datasource.

tools.name: execute_query
tools.description: Run a saved query by id and return results.

tools.name: run_db_modification
tools.description: Run a saved DB write (data writes + confirm required).

tools.name: change_password
tools.description: Change the current user's password (admin writes required).

tools.name: get_user_groups
tools.description: List a user's groups.

tools.name: set_user_groups
tools.description: Replace a user's groups (admin writes required).

tools.name: get_user_permissions
tools.description: List a user's permissions.

tools.name: set_user_permissions
tools.description: Replace a user's permissions (admin writes required).

tools.name: get_me
tools.description: Get the current user.

tools.name: update_me
tools.description: Update the current user's profile (admin writes required).

tools.name: get_config
tools.description: Get the portal config document.

tools.name: update_config
tools.description: Set a config value by path (admin writes required).

tools.name: vc_status
tools.description: Report portal version-control status (PORTAL_VC_DIR).

tools.name: snapshot_portal
tools.description: Export all content resources to the git repo and commit.

tools.name: vc_log
tools.description: List version-control commits, optionally for one record.

tools.name: restore_resource
tools.description: Revert a content record to a prior committed version.

prompts.name: create_zportal_block
prompts.description: Guided workflow to build a correct zPortal HTML block.
prompts.text: Build a Zuar Portal HTML block for: ${arguments.goal}. Datasource hint: ${arguments.datasource_hint}. Read the zportal://guide resources, discover the datasource with list_resource, then create the block.

portal_url.title: Portal URL
portal_url.description: Base URL of your Zuar Portal, e.g. https://your-portal.zuarbase.net

portal_api_key.title: Portal API Key
portal_api_key.description: API key from zPortal Admin -> Auth -> API Keys.

portal_user_id.title: Portal User ID
portal_user_id.description: Your user UUID from zPortal Admin -> Users (copy from the URL).

portal_readonly.title: Read-only mode
portal_readonly.description: Block ALL writes (create/update/delete). Discovery and reads still work.

portal_allow_data_writes.title: Allow data writes
portal_allow_data_writes.description: Enable datasource and db_modification writes (SQL-bearing). Off by default.

portal_allow_admin_writes.title: Allow admin writes
portal_allow_admin_writes.description: Enable user/group/permission/password/config writes. Off by default.

portal_vc_dir.title: Version-control repo path
portal_vc_dir.description: Path to a git repo. When set, every content write (blocks/pages/queries/themes/...) is mirrored to JSON and auto-committed so it can be reverted with restore_resource. Leave blank to disable.

portal_vc_push.title: Push version control to remote
portal_vc_push.description: After each commit, git push to the configured remote (requires a remote + auth). Off by default (commits stay local).

portal_vc_remote.title: Version-control remote
portal_vc_remote.description: Git remote name to push to when 'Push version control' is on.

portal_design_file.title: Design system file
portal_design_file.description: Path to a custom design.md to override the bundled house visual design system. Leave blank to use the default.
